---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you're requesting.

## Problem / Motivation

Is your feature request related to a problem? e.g., "It would be helpful to have X because Y".

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Who would benefit from this feature? How would they use it?

## Example

If applicable, provide a code or UI example showing how the feature would work.

```vue
<DocPreview
  :source="file"
  :new-feature="value"
  @new-event="handler"
/>
```

## Priority

How important is this to you?

- [ ] Critical (blocks my work)
- [ ] High (would significantly improve my workflow)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (minor improvement)

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or related issues.
